title: Hedge Your Bet
description: You know two aspects of ingredient 1. Which aspect is still uncertain — safe to hedge?

hints.text: You know R− and G+ for ingredient 1. Which alchemicals share both of those signs? Check if their third aspect (Blue) agrees.
Both candidates have R− and G+. One has B−, the other has B+. So the Blue sign could go either way — you cannot be certain.
Hedge the Blue aspect. Red and Green are already confirmed safe (you know their signs). Blue is the only one a debunker could still prove wrong.
